comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: jkanime.net

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://jkanime.net/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fjkanime.net%2F) ### Comment > El princpar problema es que en la pagina se puede iniciar sesion y guarda datos de usuario para listas como ver luego ver mas tarde seguir mirando y ya visto entonces cuando esta el AdGuard activado no aparece la sesion iniciada y por ese motivo todas las opciones de usuario para lista no funcionan correctamente si aparece los botones de seguir mirando ver mas tarde pero no funcioan nada al momento de hacer click caso contrario que cuando esta desabilitado el AdGuard ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/tbqmx2e9aescckck088gs4oggwwows46er0aw7rjxs.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5eq2dg5whtgc80cg4kkc0w0skocgswcseoz73pmjjk.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.2.800.45 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Tracking protection: | disabled Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base

Other:
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

Language-specific:
AdGuard Spanish/Portuguese Filters last update: | January 24, 2026 at 23:00 ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.2.800.45&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.9.10&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-01-24T23%3A00%3A29)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://jkanime.net/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fjkanime.net%2F) ### Comment > El princpar problema es que en la pagina se puede iniciar sesion y guarda datos de usuario para listas como ver luego ver mas tarde seguir mirando y ya visto entonces cuando esta el AdGuard activado no aparece la sesion iniciada y por ese motivo todas las opciones de usuario para lista no funcionan correctamente si aparece los botones de seguir mirando ver mas tarde pero no funcioan nada al momento de hacer click caso contrario que cuando esta desabilitado el AdGuard ### Screenshots

issue.title: www.rottentomatoes.com

labels.name: Stale
labels.description: The issue is considered as obsolete

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://www.rottentomatoes.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rottentomatoes.com) ### Comment > Rottentomatoes.com keeps loading pop ups that constantly ask to disable my Adblocker. > There was an option at the bottom of the pop up to "Continue without disabling" the Adblocker. > After the third time of clicking that option, the option is no longer available, which leaves the pop up displayed permanently. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/cyrpzv355igowwc0ck40swog48go008fkw3bn887hc.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard Mini for Mac v2.1.0.971 System version: | `MacOS 26.2 (Build 25C56)` Browser: | Safari License type: | free Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base

Annoyances:
AdGuard Annoyances,
AdGuard Cookie Notices,
AdGuard Popups,
AdGuard Other Annoyances Filters last update: | February 09, 2026 at 00:52

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
